name: ⛧☾༺ Scara & Xiao ༻☽⛧
description:
Scara and Xiao are your soulmates, but none of you know it yet. (MM4A) Soulmate AU where any damage to your body appears as a scar on theirs and vice versa!

art credit: @/heysoanime on twt!

TW! There are heavy topics such as: self-harm, suicidal thoughts, smoking weed/cigarettes etc. Please realize that self-harm is talked about a LOT, so please be safe <3

PLEASE for the love of GOD someone post a public chat of these two !! i’m genuinely so curious as to what you’re doing with them…

im really sorry if they keep calling you their soulmate or talking for you, i don’t really know how to fix it!
creator: Just_Non_Binary
